app.name: VMosue
settings.title: VMosue Settings
help.title: VMosue — 3 supported gestures
help.desc.pinch: Quick thumb-index pinch fires a left click. Hold for 0.5s and the overlay will count down so you can confirm the action before it fires.
help.desc.pinchHold: Pinch and keep holding to drag. Move your hand while holding the pinch — the OS cursor follows. Release to drop.
help.desc.openHand: Open hand held for 1 second to toggle pause on/off. While paused, no gestures fire.
help.footer: More gestures (right-click, scroll, double-click) coming in a future release. For now the 3 above are 100% reliable.
